info.title: polytoria.trade API
info.description:
API for [polytoria.trade](https://polytoria.trade), not affiliated with Polytoria

This API is built with [tRPC](https://trpc.io). Procedures mapped to their HTTP endpoints.

post.summary: Search items by name or shorthand
Browse items with filters and sorting

get.summary: Get item with tags and latest listing
Get trade history for a specific serial
Get recent trades for an item
Get recent trades for a user
